title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Project Assistant II Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the educational qualification of B.C.A/B.Sc. with minimum 2 years of post-qualification experience and are within the age limit range (please refer to the official notification) are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant II vacancies. The online application process for IIT Gandhinagar

basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Project Assistant II Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the educational qualification of B.C.A/B.Sc. with minimum 2 years of post-qualification experience and are within the age limit range (please refer to the official notification) are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant II vacancies. The online application process for IIT Gandhinagar

qualification.education_qualification: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent with minimum 2 years post-qualification experience, Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards, Minimum 55% or equivalent in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Project Assistant II: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience. Candidates should have a minimum 60% or equivalent grade in percentage/grade points from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant II posts at IIT Gandhinagar is 15th June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant II position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Assistant II position in the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant II role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent degree with at least 2 years of post-qualification experience. Specific percentage requirements for graduation, 10th, and 12th class also apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant II position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 55,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant II recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant II position is a contractual role at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is OTH/347/Ad/2021.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date was 12 May 2026, and the last date to apply is 15 June 2026.
